target: Verify V3 seed update provides UNIQUE content per lesson (fixing boring identical content bug)
summary: All V3 seed data verified. Each lesson in a unit now has DIFFERENT reading passages, listening scripts, warmup questions, vocabulary subsets, and proper grammar rule distribution.

unique_reading_passages_unit1.description: All 4 lessons in Unit 1 have DIFFERENT reading passages
unique_reading_passages_unit1.evidence: API test: 4 unique passages returned. L1='Hello! I am Tom. I am a student...', L2='I have an apple. The apple is red...', L3='Hello! My name is Tom...', L4='I am Tom. Hello, everyone!...'

unique_listening_scripts_unit1.description: All 4 lessons in Unit 1 have DIFFERENT listening scripts
unique_listening_scripts_unit1.evidence: API test: 4 unique scripts confirmed via /api/unified/lessons/{lesson_id}/activity/listening

unique_warmup_questions_unit1.description: All 4 lessons in Unit 1 have DIFFERENT warmup questions
unique_warmup_questions_unit1.evidence: API test: 4 unique question sets. Each lesson asks about different vocabulary definitions.

unique_vocabulary_subsets_unit1.description: L1/L2 have different word subsets (first 3 vs last 3)
unique_vocabulary_subsets_unit1.evidence: API test: L1 words=['apple','cat','hello'], L2 words=['ball','student','teacher']

reading_question_counts.description: L1/L2 have 2 questions, L3/L4 have 3 questions
reading_question_counts.evidence: API test: L1=2, L2=2, L3=3, L4=3 comprehension questions per passage

grammar_rules_distribution.description: L1: 1 rule, L2: 1 different rule, L3/L4: both rules
grammar_rules_distribution.evidence: API test: L1=['I am + name'], L2=['Hello! / Hi!'], L3=['I am + name', 'Hello! / Hi!'], L4=['I am + name', 'Hello! / Hi!']. Frontend shows 'Rule 1/2' for L3

unit5_unique_content.description: Unit 5 (My Family) also has unique content per lesson
unit5_unique_content.evidence: API test: 4 unique reading passages, 4 unique listening scripts, 4 unique warmup question sets confirmed

cross_unit_unique_content.description: Units 1, 3, 5, 8, 10 all have unique reading per lesson
cross_unit_unique_content.evidence: API test: All tested units have 4/4 unique reading passages

api_test_results.unit1_vocab_different: PASS - L1/L2 have different word subsets
api_test_results.unit1_grammar_distribution: PASS - L1:1 rule, L2:1 diff rule, L3/L4:2 rules

critical_code_review_comments: V3 seed script correctly selects different reading[idx] for each lesson_num
Grammar rules properly split: L1 gets rules[0], L2 gets rules[1], L3/L4 get all rules
Warmup questions use different word subsets per lesson for variety
Frontend correctly displays 'Rule 1/2' indicator showing 2 rules for L3
Question count correctly shows 'Question 1/2' for L1/L2 and 'Question 1/3' for L3/L4

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All UI elements displaying unique content correctly

seed_data_creation: None - tested existing V3 seed data
context_for_next_testing_agent: V3 seed verified working. Each unit has 4 lessons with unique content. L1='Meet the Words' (first 3 vocab, rule 1, 2 reading questions), L2='Practice Time' (last 3 vocab, rule 2, 2 reading questions), L3='Read and Learn' (combined vocab, both rules, 3 reading questions), L4='Review and Speak' (all vocab, both rules, 3 reading questions). API endpoints: GET /api/unified/lessons/{lesson_id}/activity/{activity_type}. Activity types: micro_reading, listening, grammar_focus, vocabulary, retrieval_warmup.

mocked_api.listening_audio: Uses browser SpeechSynthesis (TTS) instead of actual audio files - this is MOCKED
